issues_found: Source duration was 101.782s, longer than the required 88-98s deliverable window.
Silent/dead-air lead-in through about 5.018s and silent tail beginning around 100.436s.
Frozen/static damaged section detected at 32.300-37.300s, with mostly dead audio during the range.
Source audio measured about -27.0 LUFS integrated with true peaks above 0 dBFS, unsuitable for publishing without loudness repair.
